title: Nexus common definitions (v1alpha1)
description: Reusable definitions shared across the managed-platform contract schemas. TARGET-STATE: none of these contracts is implemented yet; they define the agreed shape before code.

SemVer.description: Semantic version MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH, optionally with prerelease/build metadata.

SemVerRange.description: Semantic version constraint expression, e.g. '>=1.0.0 <2.0.0' or '^1.2'.

InstanceId.description: Stable, opaque identifier of a Runtime instance.

Modality.description: Deployment modality chosen for the instance.

UpdateChannel.description: Release channel for core or content.

Signature.description: Detached cryptographic signature over a canonicalised payload. Approved hybrid model (ADR-0002): ed25519 for Hub control-plane/desired-state (keys in KMS/HSM where managed); sigstore-cosign for public releases/packages/SBOM/provenance (keyless OIDC); minisign for offline/self-hosted package verification. `age` is encryption ONLY and is NOT a valid signing algorithm here.

algorithm.description: Signature scheme. `age` is intentionally excluded: age is envelope encryption, never signing.

key_id.description: Identifier of the public key (or keyless identity) that verifies this signature.

value.description: Base64url-encoded signature bytes (or cosign bundle reference).

canonicalization.description: Canonicalization applied to the payload before signing.

trust_domain.description: Trust root the verifier must resolve the key against (e.g. 'hub.nexusos.dev', 'sigstore-public-good', 'operator-mtls-ca'). Disambiguates which root of trust applies.

key_custody.description: Where the signing private key lives. Managed Hub signing keys use kms/hsm; public releases use keyless_oidc (Sigstore); offline/self-hosted may use local_file (minisign).

TransparencyLogEntry.description: Public transparency-log (Rekor) inclusion metadata for Sigstore/Cosign signatures. Present for public releases/packages; absent for private Hub desired-state (which must verify without any public log). Contains public metadata only.

inclusion_proof.description: Whether an offline-verifiable inclusion proof is bundled.

oidc_issuer.description: OIDC issuer that vouched for the keyless identity (e.g. 'https://token.actions.githubusercontent.com').

certificate_identity.description: SAN/identity the release certificate was bound to (e.g. a CI workflow identity).

AgeRecipient.description: Public X25519 recipient metadata for age envelope encryption (ADR-0005). Encryption only — never signing. Carries NO secret material.

type.description: age recipient type. Only X25519 recipients are used.

recipient.description: Public age recipient string (bech32 'age1...'). Public key material, safe to publish.

SpdxLicense.description: SPDX license expression identifying the license of the content (e.g. 'Apache-2.0', 'AGPL-3.0-only', 'LicenseRef-Ironbat-Commercial-1.0'). This is the CONTENT license only; NexusOS/Ironbat trademark rights are governed separately and are never granted by this field.

ReplayGuard.description: Nonce + timestamp pair protecting a signed message against replay. See ADR-0002 / ADR-0004.

nonce.description: Single-use random value; the verifier rejects repeats within the validity window.
